base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of projectile_ice_beam_nar — a projectile (special_attack_proj) from 1986 metroid. Ice Beam (NAR variant — labeled on sheet) — alternate variant used in Famicom Disk System / alt-ROM. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Ice Beam (NAR variant — labeled on sheet) — alternate variant used in Famicom Disk System / alt-ROM
